'''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]の中で[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]以外のものの総称である。'''撰日'''とも書き、また、'''雑注'''ともいう。
'''選日'''には、一般に以下のものがある。そのほとんどは、[[干支|十干十二支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占うものである。 *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[不成就日]] *[[天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[大土・小土]]

{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う物であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日（たくじつ）・撰日・雑注'''ともいう。[[暦注]]の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。[[古代中国]]の[[農暦|農民暦]]の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、農民暦が基になっているとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢,黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識！搞懂「當日紀要」神祉，挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。[[一粒万倍日]]等は日本に農民暦が入ってきた後に独自に作られた信憑性に乏しい内容であり、農民暦には[[一粒万倍日]]は存在しない。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）

==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）

{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う物であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''撰日'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、農民暦が基になっているとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。しかし、[[一粒万倍日]]等は日本に農民暦が入ってきた後に独自に作られた信憑性に乏しい内容であり、農民暦には一粒万倍日は存在しない。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。

revision.text:
{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う物であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''撰日'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、農民暦が基になっているとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。しかし、[[一粒万倍日]]等は日本に農民暦が入ってきた後に独自に作られた信憑性に乏しい内容であり、農民暦には一粒万倍日は存在しない。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
==外部リンク== *[https://koyomi8.com/directjp.cgi?https://koyomi8.com/sub/rekicyuu.html 暦注計算]（こよみのページ）
{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:せんしつ}} [[Category:暦法]] [[Category:占星術]] [[Category:占い]] [[Category:術数学]] [[Category:陰陽道]] [[Category:暦注]]

revision.text:
```markdown {{Citation needed|date=March 2011}} '''Senjitsuhō''' (撰日法, also referred to as '''{{ill|Selection method|ja|選日}}''') is the method of determining auspicious or inauspicious days in {{ill|calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. There are three primary types of Senjitsuhō: '''Tsukigiri''' (月切り), '''Sekigiri''' (節切り), and '''Fudan''' (不断).
== Tsukigiri (月切り) == Tsukigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|lunar month|ja|旧暦}}. Specifically, it uses the days and {{ill|sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} starting from the first day (Saku) of the lunar month. A representative example of Tsukigiri-based annotations is the {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, which includes Senkachi (先勝), Tomobiki (友引), Senmake (先負), Butsumetsu (仏滅), Taian (大安), and Shakkō (赤口).
== Sekigiri (節切り) == Sekigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|solar terms|ja|二十四節気}}, specifically using the days and sexagenary cycle starting from each {{ill|solar term's start|ja|節気}}. Many calendar annotations follow Sekigiri. For example, under Sekigiri, the first month of the year (正月) begins with {{ill|Risshun|ja|立春}} and ends the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|ja|啓蟄}}.
The classification of {{ill|kigo (seasonal words)|ja|季語}} in {{ill|haiku|ja|俳句}} also follows Sekigiri.
== Fudan (不断) == Fudan is a method where calendar annotations remain constant, regardless of whether they are based on the lunar month or solar terms. For example, {{ill|Ten'enbi|ja|天恩日}} is always fixed to a specific day of the sexagenary cycle.
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Calendar annotations]] ```
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[ja:撰日法]] [[Category:Senpō forks]]

The classification of {{ill|kigo (seasonal words)|ja|季語}} in {{ill|haiku|ja|俳句}} also follows Sekigiri.

to as '''{{ill|Selection method|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:選日]]''') is the method of determining auspicious or inauspicious days in {{ill|calendar annotations|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:暦注]]. There are three primary types of Senjitsuhō: '''Tsukigiri''' (月切り), '''Sekigiri''' (節切り), and '''Fudan''' (不断).
== Tsukigiri (月切り) == Tsukigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|lunar month|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:旧暦]]. Specifically, it uses the days and {{ill|sexagenary cycle|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:干支]] starting from the first day (Saku) of the lunar month. A representative example of Tsukigiri-based annotations is the {{ill|Rokuyō|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:六曜]], which includes Senkachi (先勝), Tomobiki (友引), Senmake (先負), Butsumetsu (仏滅), Taian (大安), and Shakkō (赤口).
== Sekigiri (節切り) == Sekigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|solar terms|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:二十四節気]], specifically using the days and sexagenary cycle starting from each {{ill|solar term's start|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:節気]]. Many calendar annotations follow Sekigiri. For example, under Sekigiri, the first month of the year (正月) begins with {{ill|Risshun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:立春]] and ends the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:啓蟄]].
The classification of {{ill|kigo (seasonal words)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:季語]] in {{ill|haiku|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:俳句]] also follows Sekigiri.
== Fudan (不断) == Fudan is a method where calendar annotations remain constant, regardless of whether they are based on the lunar month or solar terms. For example, {{ill|Ten'enbi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:天恩日]] is always fixed to a specific day of the sexagenary cycle.
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Calendar annotations]] ```
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[ja:撰日法]] [[Category:Senpō forks]]

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

There are three primary types of Senjitsuhō: '''Tsukigiri''' (月切り), '''Sekigiri''' (節切り), and '''Fudan''' (不断).
== Tsukigiri (月切り) == Tsukigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|lunar month|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:旧暦]]. Specifically, it uses the days and {{ill|sexagenary cycle|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:干支]] starting from the first day (Saku) of the lunar month. A representative example of Tsukigiri-based annotations is the {{ill|Rokuyō|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:六曜]], which includes Senkachi (先勝), Tomobiki (友引), Senmake (先負), Butsumetsu (仏滅), Taian (大安), and Shakkō (赤口).
== Sekigiri (節切り) == Sekigiri determines calendar annotations based on the {{ill|solar terms|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:二十四節気]], specifically using the days and sexagenary cycle starting from each {{ill|solar term's start|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:節気]]. Many calendar annotations follow Sekigiri. For example, under Sekigiri, the first month of the year (正月) begins with {{ill|Risshun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:立春]] and ends the day before {{ill|Keichitsu|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:啓蟄]].
The classification of {{ill|kigo (seasonal words)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:季語]] in {{ill|haiku|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:俳句]] also follows Sekigiri.
== Fudan (不断) == Fudan is a method where calendar annotations remain constant, regardless of whether they are based on the lunar month or solar terms. For example, {{ill|Ten'enbi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[ja:天恩日]] is always fixed to a specific day of the sexagenary cycle.
[[Category:Senpō]][[category:unsorted completion categories]]

Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.

Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

revision.text:
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. '''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|12=draft}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=draft}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=draft}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=draft}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=draft}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

revision.text:
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=draft|12=draft}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦|12=draft|12=draft}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=draft|12=draft}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=draft|12=draft}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=draft|12=draft}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦|12=draft|12=draft}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=draft|12=draft}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=draft|12=draft}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Calendar annotations|ja|暦注|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=draft|12=draft}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Nongminli|ja|中国暦|12=draft|12=draft}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=draft|12=draft}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Seven-day week|ja|七曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Twenty-eight mansions|ja|二十八宿|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=draft|12=draft}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=draft|12=draft}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=draft|12=draft}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.
== References == {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う物であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''撰日'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、農民暦が基になっているとされている<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":1">{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":2">{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":3">{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref name=":4">{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。
しかし'''[[一粒万倍日]]に関しては[[選日]]の[[本家]]である[[中国]]の「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」には存在せず、非常に信憑性の低い選日'''である<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" /><ref name=":2" /><ref name=":3" /><ref name=":4" /><ref>{{Cite web |title=一粒万倍日は吉日ではありません |url=https://fengshui.jp/syuzan/?p=7498 |website=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界 |date=2019-02-24 |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |last=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界}}</ref>。{{main|十二節}}
== 起源・歴史 == [[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」が基になっており、中国大陸から日本に伝わったとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=通書(ツウショ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E9%80%9A%E6%9B%B8-98946 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,普及版 |last=字通}}</ref>。
選日術は古くから盛んであり、古来から現在まで何千年も続いている。『[[礼記]]』には「外事用剛日、内事用柔日」という言葉があり<ref>「大事有時日；小事無時日，有筮。外事用剛日，內事用柔日。不違龜筮。」</ref>、『[[春秋左氏伝]]』には「天子には日官があり、諸侯には日御がいる」と記録されている。漢代時代には諸家の流派が立ち上がり、[[唐]][[宋 (王朝)|宋]]時代に成熟した体系が始まった。宋から[[明]][[清]]時代にかけて選日は徐々に浸透した。
選日をまとめた『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref>{{Cite web |title=トランプと台湾の大富豪も使っている風水の秘書『通書』とは？｜ウーマンエキサイト |url=https://woman.excite.co.jp/article/lifestyle/rid_Jisin_32288/ |website=ウーマンエキサイト |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja}}</ref>は「通天人之際」から名付けられ、「通勝」「紅皮通書」とも呼ばれ、[[黄暦]]にて日選びの理論や宜忌規則等のの内容を専門的に解説している。民間に伝わる通書の多くは『鳌頭通書』『象吉通書』『永吉通書』『[[:zh:協紀辨方書|協紀辨方書]]』等を参考に編集されている。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
==外部リンク== *[https://koyomi8.com/directjp.cgi?https://koyomi8.com/sub/rekicyuu.html 暦注計算]（こよみのページ）
{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:せんしつ}} [[Category:暦法]] [[Category:占星術]] [[Category:占い]] [[Category:術数学]] [[Category:陰陽道]] [[Category:暦注]]

revision.text:
{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う物であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''擇日術'''・'''撰日'''・'''選日術'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、農民暦が基になっているとされている<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":1">{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":2">{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":3">{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref name=":4">{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。
しかし'''[[一粒万倍日]]に関しては'''選日'''の[[本家]]である[[中国]]の「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」や『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』には存在せず、非常に信憑性の低い選日'''である<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" /><ref name=":2" /><ref name=":3" /><ref name=":4" /><ref>{{Cite web |title=一粒万倍日は吉日ではありません |url=https://fengshui.jp/syuzan/?p=7498 |website=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界 |date=2019-02-24 |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |last=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界}}</ref>。{{main|十二節}}
== 起源・歴史 == [[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」が基になっており、中国大陸から日本に伝わったとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=通書(ツウショ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E9%80%9A%E6%9B%B8-98946 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,普及版 |last=字通}}</ref>。
選日術は古くから盛んであり、古来から現在まで何千年も続いている。『[[礼記]]』には「外事用剛日、内事用柔日」という言葉があり<ref>「大事有時日；小事無時日，有筮。外事用剛日，內事用柔日。不違龜筮。」</ref>、『[[春秋左氏伝]]』には「天子には日官があり、諸侯には日御がいる」と記録されている。漢代時代には諸家の流派が立ち上がり、[[唐]][[宋 (王朝)|宋]]時代に成熟した体系が始まった。宋から[[明]][[清]]時代にかけて選日は徐々に浸透した。
選日をまとめた『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref>{{Cite web |title=トランプと台湾の大富豪も使っている風水の秘書『通書』とは？｜ウーマンエキサイト |url=https://woman.excite.co.jp/article/lifestyle/rid_Jisin_32288/ |website=ウーマンエキサイト |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja}}</ref>は「通天人之際」から名付けられ、「通勝」「紅皮通書」とも呼ばれ、[[黄暦]]にて日選びの理論や宜忌規則等のの内容を専門的に解説している。民間に伝わる通書の多くは『鳌頭通書』『象吉通書』『永吉通書』『[[:zh:協紀辨方書|協紀辨方書]]』等を参考に編集されている。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
==外部リンク== *[https://koyomi8.com/directjp.cgi?https://koyomi8.com/sub/rekicyuu.html 暦注計算]（こよみのページ）
{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:せんしつ}} [[Category:暦法]] [[Category:占星術]] [[Category:占い]] [[Category:術数学]] [[Category:陰陽道]] [[Category:暦注]]

{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う[[占術]]であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''擇日術'''・'''撰日'''・'''選日術'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。
[[日本]]の選日占術は、[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」や『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref name=":5" /><ref name=":6">{{Cite web |title=日家吉神と日家凶神を理解して凶日を避けて吉日を知る！【風水】 {{!}} トラベルクエスト |url=https://web.archive.org/web/20250429033404/https://www.travel-quest.net/column/2163/ |website=web.archive.org |date=2025-04-29 |access-date=2025-04-29}}</ref>の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、古代中国の占術が基になっているとされている<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":1">{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":2">{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":3">{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref name=":4">{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。 しかし日本の選日には誤りが多く存在し、'''[[一粒万倍日]]に関しては選日の[[本家]]である[[中国]]の「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」や『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』には存在せず、非常に信憑性の低い選日'''であるなど<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" /><ref name=":2" /><ref name=":3" /><ref name=":4" /><ref>{{Cite web |title=一粒万倍日は吉日ではありません |url=https://fengshui.jp/syuzan/?p=7498 |website=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界 |date=2019-02-24 |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |last=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界}}</ref>、日本の選日においては注意が必要である。{{main|十二節}}
== 起源・歴史 == [[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」が基になっており、中国大陸から日本に伝わったとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=通書(ツウショ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E9%80%9A%E6%9B%B8-98946 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,普及版 |last=字通}}</ref>。
日本には[[奈良時代]]の[[具注暦]]に[[暦注下段|暦注]]が確認できる事から、それ以前には日本に伝わっていた<ref>{{Cite web |title=具注暦(グチュウレキ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%85%B7%E6%B3%A8%E6%9A%A6-55497 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-29 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,改訂新版 世界大百科事典,日本大百科全書(ニッポニカ),ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,百科事典マイペディア,山川 日本史小辞典 改訂新版,旺文社日本史事典 |last=三訂版,世界大百科事典内言及}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=日本の天文学の歩み 展示資料 具註暦 |url=https://www.lib.u-tokyo.ac.jp/html/tenjikai/tenjikai2009/shiryo/kaisetsu02.html |website=www.lib.u-tokyo.ac.jp |access-date=2025-04-29}}</ref>。
選日術は古くから盛んであり、古来から現在まで何千年も続いている。『[[礼記]]』には「外事用剛日、内事用柔日」という言葉があり<ref>「大事有時日；小事無時日，有筮。外事用剛日，內事用柔日。不違龜筮。」</ref>、『[[春秋左氏伝]]』には「天子には日官があり、諸侯には日御がいる」と記録されている。漢代時代には諸家の流派が立ち上がり、[[唐]][[宋 (王朝)|宋]]時代に成熟した体系が始まった。宋から[[明]][[清]]時代にかけて選日は徐々に浸透した。
選日をまとめた『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref name=":5">{{Cite web |title=トランプと台湾の大富豪も使っている風水の秘書『通書』とは？｜ウーマンエキサイト |url=https://woman.excite.co.jp/article/lifestyle/rid_Jisin_32288/ |website=ウーマンエキサイト |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja}}</ref><ref name=":6" />は「通天人之際」から名付けられ、「通勝」「紅皮通書」とも呼ばれ、[[黄暦]]にて日選びの理論や宜忌規則等のの内容を専門的に解説している。民間に伝わる通書の多くは『鳌頭通書』『象吉通書』『永吉通書』『[[:zh:協紀辨方書|協紀辨方書]]』等を参考に編集されている。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}

選日術は古くから盛んであり、古来から現在まで何千年も続いている。『[[礼記]]』には「外事用剛日、内事用柔日」という言葉があり<ref>「大事有時日；小事無時日，有筮。外事用剛日，內事用柔日。不違龜筮。」</ref>、『[[春秋左氏伝]]』には「天子には日官があり、諸侯には日御がいる」と記録されている。漢代時代には諸家の流派が立ち上がり、[[唐]][[宋 (王朝)|宋]]時代に成熟した体系が始まった。宋から[[明]][[清]]時代にかけて選日は徐々に浸透した。
選日をまとめた『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref name=":5">{{Cite web |title=トランプと台湾の大富豪も使っている風水の秘書『通書』とは？｜ウーマンエキサイト |url=https://woman.excite.co.jp/article/lifestyle/rid_Jisin_32288/ |website=ウーマンエキサイト |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja}}</ref><ref name=":6" />は「通天人之際」から名付けられ、「通勝」「紅皮通書」とも呼ばれ、[[黄暦]]にて日選びの理論や宜忌規則等のの内容を専門的に解説している。民間に伝わる通書の多くは『鳌頭通書』『象吉通書』『永吉通書』『[[:zh:協紀辨方書|協紀辨方書]]』等を参考に編集されている。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。
==脚注== {{Reflist}}
==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
==外部リンク== *[https://koyomi8.com/directjp.cgi?https://koyomi8.com/sub/rekicyuu.html 暦注計算]（こよみのページ）
{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:せんしつ}} [[Category:暦法]] [[Category:占星術]] [[Category:占い]] [[Category:術数学]] [[Category:陰陽道]] [[Category:暦注]]

revision.comment: 41 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:選日 up to rev 104665601
revision.text:
{{複数の問題 | 単一の出典 = 2021年5月 | 一次資料 = 2021年5月 }} '''選日'''（せんじつ）とは、[[暦注]]上において[[干支]]の組合せによってその日の吉凶を占う[[占術]]であり、[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]等を含めた総称である。'''擇日'''（たくじつ）・'''擇日術'''・'''撰日'''・'''選日術'''・'''雑注'''ともいう。暦注の日取りの方法は[[撰日法]]という。
[[日本]]の選日占術は、[[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」や『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref name=":5" /><ref name=":6">{{Cite web |title=日家吉神と日家凶神を理解して凶日を避けて吉日を知る！【風水】 {{!}} トラベルクエスト |url=https://web.archive.org/web/20250429033404/https://www.travel-quest.net/column/2163/ |website=web.archive.org |date=2025-04-29 |access-date=2025-04-29}}</ref>の内容と重なる内容が多く見受けられるなど、古代中国の占術が基になっているとされている<ref name=":0">{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":1">{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":2">{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20}}</ref><ref name=":3">{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)}}</ref><ref name=":4">{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS}}</ref>。 しかし日本の選日には誤りが多く存在し、'''[[一粒万倍日]]に関しては選日の[[本家]]である[[中国]]の「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」や『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』には存在せず、非常に信憑性の低い選日'''であるなど<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" /><ref name=":2" /><ref name=":3" /><ref name=":4" /><ref>{{Cite web |title=一粒万倍日は吉日ではありません |url=https://fengshui.jp/syuzan/?p=7498 |website=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界 |date=2019-02-24 |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |last=現役風水師が伝える伝統風水の世界}}</ref>、日本の選日においては注意が必要である。{{main|十二節}}
== 起源・歴史 == [[古代中国]]から続く「[[:zh:萬年曆|萬年曆]]（または萬年[[中国暦|農民暦]]）」が基になっており、中国大陸から日本に伝わったとされている<ref>{{Cite web |title=通書(ツウショ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E9%80%9A%E6%9B%B8-98946 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,普及版 |last=字通}}</ref>。
日本では[[奈良時代]]の[[具注暦]]に[[暦注下段|暦注]]が確認できる事から、それ以前には日本に伝わっていた<ref>{{Cite web |title=具注暦(グチュウレキ)とは？ 意味や使い方 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%85%B7%E6%B3%A8%E6%9A%A6-55497 |website=コトバンク |access-date=2025-04-29 |language=ja |first=デジタル大辞泉,精選版 日本国語大辞典,改訂新版 世界大百科事典,日本大百科全書(ニッポニカ),ブリタニカ国際大百科事典 小項目事典,百科事典マイペディア,山川 日本史小辞典 改訂新版,旺文社日本史事典 |last=三訂版,世界大百科事典内言及}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=日本の天文学の歩み 展示資料 具註暦 |url=https://www.lib.u-tokyo.ac.jp/html/tenjikai/tenjikai2009/shiryo/kaisetsu02.html |website=www.lib.u-tokyo.ac.jp |access-date=2025-04-29}}</ref>。
選日術は古くから盛んであり、古来から現在まで何千年も続いている。『[[礼記]]』には「外事用剛日、内事用柔日」という言葉があり<ref>「大事有時日；小事無時日，有筮。外事用剛日，內事用柔日。不違龜筮。」</ref>、『[[春秋左氏伝]]』には「天子には日官があり、諸侯には日御がいる」と記録されている。漢代時代には諸家の流派が立ち上がり、[[唐]][[宋 (王朝)|宋]]時代に成熟した体系が始まった。宋から[[明]][[清]]時代にかけて選日は徐々に浸透した。
選日をまとめた『[[:zh:黃曆|通書]]』<ref name=":5">{{Cite web |title=トランプと台湾の大富豪も使っている風水の秘書『通書』とは？｜ウーマンエキサイト |url=https://woman.excite.co.jp/article/lifestyle/rid_Jisin_32288/ |website=ウーマンエキサイト |access-date=2025-04-17 |language=ja}}</ref><ref name=":6" />は「通天人之際」から名付けられ、「通勝」「紅皮通書」とも呼ばれ、[[黄暦]]にて日選びの理論や宜忌規則等のの内容を専門的に解説している。民間に伝わる通書の多くは『鳌頭通書』『象吉通書』『永吉通書』『[[:zh:協紀辨方書|協紀辨方書]]』等を参考に編集されている。
==一覧== *[[一粒万倍日]] *[[不成就日]] *[[八専]] *[[十方暮]] *[[天一神|天一天上]] *[[三隣亡]] *[[三伏]] *[[犯土]]（大土・小土） *[[臘日]] *その他（[[六曜]]・[[七曜]]・[[十二直]]（中段）・[[二十八宿]]・[[九星]]・[[暦注下段]]の内容）
六曜・七曜・十二直・二十八宿・九星・暦注下段以外のもののうち、一粒万倍日や不成就日、三隣亡、[[天赦日]]（本来は暦注下段に属するが、選日の欄に書かれる場合もある）といった選日は、選日の中でも比較的有名なため、七曜表形式の[[カレンダー]]である程度の情報量がある場合に記載される一方、その他の八専・十方暮・天一天上・犯土などは、現代日本ではマイナーなため、七曜表形式のカレンダーに記載されることはほとんどない。

==参考文献== *{{Cite book|和書 |author1=岡田芳朗|authorlink1=岡田芳朗|author2=阿久根末忠|authorlink2=阿久根末忠 |year = 1993 |title = 現代こよみ読み解き事典 |publisher = 柏書房 |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
