<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60988968]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} in {{ill|rekichū|ja|暦注|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rekichū|qq=}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu-hō|1=Senpō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498765}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Nongminli}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!|qq=}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS|qq=}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujōju Day|1=Fujōju Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11361751}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichijin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanrimbō|1=Sanrinbō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358293}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpuku|1=Sambok|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9385304}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rōjitsu|1=Roujitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11612427}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}}, {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tensha Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Perpetual calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カレンダー|1=wall calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1309927}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]]
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} in {{ill|rekichū|ja|暦注|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rekichū|qq=}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu-hō|1=Senpō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498765}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Nongminli}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!|qq=}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS|qq=}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujōju Day|1=Fujōju Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11361751}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichijin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanrimbō|1=Sanrinbō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358293}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpuku|1=Sambok|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9385304}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rōjitsu|1=Roujitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11612427}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}}, {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}})

On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]]
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}} in {{ill|rekichū|ja|暦注|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rekichū|qq=}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu-hō|1=Senpō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498765}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Nongminli}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!|qq=}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS|qq=}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Ichiryū Manbai Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujōju Day|1=Fujōju Day|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11361751}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichijin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanrimbō|1=Sanrinbō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358293}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpuku|1=Sambok|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9385304}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rōjitsu|1=Roujitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11612427}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}}, {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tensha Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Perpetual calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カレンダー|1=wall calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1309927}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.
== References == {{Reflist|qq=}}
== Bibliography == *{{Cite book|和書 |author1={{ill|Yoshiaki Okada|ja|岡田芳朗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiaki Okada|1=Yoshirō Okada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11473682}}|authorlink1={{ill|Yoshiaki Okada|ja|岡田芳朗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiaki Okada|1=Yoshirō Okada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11473682}}|author2={{ill|Suetada Akune|ja|阿久根末忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suetada Akune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|authorlink2={{ill|Suetada Akune|ja|阿久根末忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suetada Akune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |year = 1993 |title = Modern Almanac Interpretation Dictionary (現代こよみ読み解き事典) |publisher = Kashiwashobo (柏書房) |isbn = 4-7601-0951-X }}
== External Links == * [https://koyomi8.com/directjp.cgi?https://koyomi8.com/sub/rekicyuu.html Calendar Annotation Calculations] (Koyomi Page)
''' '''

Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tensha Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Perpetual calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カレンダー|1=Calendar (publication)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1309927}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Nongminli|1=Chinese calendar}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!|qq=}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS|qq=}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Q11353036|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.
== List == * {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Q11353036|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} * {{ill|Fujōju Day|ja|不成就日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujōju Day|1=Q11361751|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11361751}} * {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} * {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} * {{ill|Ten'ichijin|ja|天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichijin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} (Ten'ichitenjō) * {{ill|Sanrimbō|ja|三隣亡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanrimbō|1=Sanrinbō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11358293}} * {{ill|Sanpuku|ja|三伏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpuku|1=Sambok|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9385304}} * {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} (Ōdo and Shōdo) * {{ill|Rōjitsu|ja|臘日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rōjitsu|1=Roujitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11612427}} * Others ({{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week|1=Classical planet}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}}, {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions|1=Twenty-Eight Mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}})
Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tensha Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Perpetual calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カレンダー|1=Calendar (publication)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1309927}}-style calendars with sufficient detail. On the other hand, minor annotations such as Hassen, Jippōkure, Ten'ichitenjō, and Hando are rarely found in modern Japanese perpetual calendars due to their lower recognition.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:選日]][[zh:擇日學]]
'''Senjitsu''' (選日) refers to a system of determining auspicious and inauspicious days based on combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}} in {{ill|rekichū|ja|暦注|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rekichū|qq=}}. It is a general term that includes {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, {{ill|Classical planet|en|Classical planet|WD=Q1135397|lt=Seven-day week|1=Classical planet}}, {{ill|Jūniji|ja|十二直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūniji|1=Twelve Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11404810}} (middle tier), {{ill|Twenty-Eight Mansions|en|Twenty-Eight Mansions|WD=Q1378760|lt=Twenty-eight mansions|1=Twenty-Eight Mansions}}, {{ill|Nine Star Ki|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Star Ki|qq=}}, and {{ill|Lower-tier calendar annotations|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lower-tier calendar annotations|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}, among others. It is also called '''Taku-jitsu''' (擇日), '''Senjitsu''' (撰日), or '''Zasshū''' (雑注). The method of determining dates in calendar annotations is called {{ill|Senjitsu-hō|ja|撰日法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu-hō|1=Senpō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498765}}. Many aspects of this system overlap with the contents of the ancient Chinese "[[:zh:萬年曆|Wànniánlì]]" (or ''Wànnián {{ill|Chinese calendar|en|Chinese calendar|WD=Q134032|lt=Nongminli|1=Chinese calendar}}''), leading to the belief that it originates from the farmers' almanac<ref>{{Cite web |title=查詢農民曆─農民曆/農曆/黃曆｜科技紫微網 |url=https://ecal.click108.com.twindex.php/ |website=ecal.click108.com.twindex.php |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2023農民曆吉時查詢、黃曆通書黃道吉日查詢 - 農民曆查詢 |url=http://www.nongli.info/huangli/ |website=www.nongli.info |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=子易預測網 - 擇日萬年曆 |url=https://forecasting.hk/calendar/ |website=forecasting.hk |access-date=2023-07-20|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=農民曆專有名詞 @ Gloria隨筆 :: 痞客邦 :: |url=http://andafansia.pixnet.net/blog/post/40052541 |website=Gloria隨筆 |date=2011-12-11 |access-date=2023-07-20 |language=zh-TW |last=Andafansia (Andafansia)|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=你應該懂的農民曆常識!搞懂「當日紀要」神祉、挑對日子趨吉避凶不求人 {{!|qq=}} 食尚玩家 |url=https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/hot/321211 |website=TVBS |date=2020-02-06 |access-date=2023-07-20 |last=TVBS|qq=}}</ref>. However, some aspects such as {{ill|Ichiryū Manbai Day|ja|一粒万倍日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichiryū Manbai Day|1=Q11353036|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353036}} were independently created in Japan after the introduction of the farmers' almanac and lack historical credibility, as they do not exist in the original almanac.

Among these, Ichiryū Manbai Day, Fujōju Day, Sanrimbō, and {{ill|Tensha Day|ja|天赦日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tensha Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} (although it originally belongs to the lower-tier calendar annotations, it is sometimes categorized under Senjitsu) are relatively well-known and are often included in {{ill|Perpetual calendar|ja|七曜表|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Perpetual calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カレンダー|1=Calendar (publication)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1309927}}-style calendars with sufficient detail.
